mapper.select:
SELECT homepage_id, survey_idx, quest_idx, quest_type, quest_content, quest_auth, quest_count, quest_detail_free_yn, quest_order, matrix_count, add_date, add_user_id, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST_DETAIL b WHERE b.survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND b.branch_idx = a.quest_idx and b.homepage_id = a.homepage_id) AS branch, required_yn FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST a WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} and homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
AND quest_type != 'COMMENT'
AND (quest_auth LIKE '%ALL%' OR quest_auth LIKE '%${userAuth}%')
ORDER BY quest_order
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST a WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} and homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND quest_type != 'COMMENT' ORDER BY quest_order
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(quest_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} and homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
INSERT INTO CMS_SURVEY_QUEST ( homepage_id, survey_idx, quest_idx, quest_type, quest_content, quest_auth, quest_count, quest_order, quest_detail_free_yn, matrix_count, add_date, add_user_id, required_yn, modify_date, modify_user_id ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{survey_idx}, #{quest_idx}, #{quest_type}, #{quest_content}, NVL(#{quest_auth}, 'ALL'), #{quest_count}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(quest_order),0)+1 FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx}), #{quest_detail_free_yn}, #{matrix_count}, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id}, #{required_yn}, SYSDATE, #{add_user_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT quest_order FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_SURVEY_QUEST SET quest_order = #{quest_order}, modify_date = SYSDATE, modify_user_id = #{modify_user_id} WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND quest_idx = #{quest_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, survey_idx, quest_idx, quest_type, quest_content, quest_auth, quest_count, quest_detail_free_yn, quest_order, matrix_count, add_date, add_user_id FROM CMS_SURVEY_QUEST WHERE survey_idx = #{survey_idx} AND homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND quest_type != 'COMMENT' ORDER BY quest_order
